---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons"
generated: true
signature-hash: 44a788242deb6fb4
description: "Multiple-comparison corrections and multi-contrast combination for mass-univariate p-value and statistic maps."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Multiple-comparison corrections and multi-contrast combination for
mass-univariate p-value and statistic maps.

These are companions to the permutation engine. They provide false-discovery-rate
control -- Benjamini-Hochberg ([`fdr_bh`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr_bh.qmd), valid under independence or
positive regression dependence), Benjamini-Yekutieli ([`fdr_by`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr_by.qmd), valid under
arbitrary dependence), and Storey's $\pi_0$-adaptive q-values
([`fdr_storey`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr_storey.qmd), higher power) behind a unified [`fdr`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr.qmd) dispatcher -- the
Bonferroni family-wise correction ([`bonferroni`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/bonferroni.qmd)), and the valid conjunction
(minimum-statistic) combination across contrasts ([`conjunction`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/conjunction.qmd),
[`conjunction_pvalue`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/conjunction_pvalue.qmd)). All are pure array operations over a flat
per-element p-value vector.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons-symbols}
:::
